rows.label: tev000701_MSG1001
rows.name:
How am I supposed to
handle this by myself?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG1002
rows.name:
Oh, don't mind me. Go on
ahead to the BLADE Home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG1003
rows.name:
There's a transport pilot just down
this way. Ask him, and he'll take you
to the administrative district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hiya, [ST:playername ]. You're not busy?
Then we should team up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0002
rows.name:
Between the two of us, I bet we
could bring down some pretty
big game! What do you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0011
rows.name: Add Doug to your team.

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline Doug's request for now.

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0003
rows.name: All right, now we're talking! Let's go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0004
rows.name:
Not up for that today, huh? Still,
you DO know I'm right, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0009
rows.name:
You have a mission to explore
Nightglow Forest, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0010
rows.name:
Looks like it pays pretty
well, too. So how about it?
Got room for me on your team?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0030
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0031
rows.name: Add Doug to your team.

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0040
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0041
rows.name: Decline Doug's request for now.

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0011
rows.name: All right, now we're talking! Let's go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0012
rows.name:
That's a shame. But if any more
good assignments come your way,
keep me in mind, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0017
rows.name:
So now it's an expedition to
Valley of Oblivion, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0018
rows.name:
I heard that area is rife with Overeds, and
real tough ones, too. Probably be a good
idea to have a specialist on your team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0019
rows.name:
If you don't have one yet, I happen
to be available. So what do you say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0050
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0051
rows.name: Add Doug to your team.

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0060
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0061
rows.name: Decline Doug's request for now.

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0020
rows.name: All right, now we're talking! Let's go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0021
rows.name:
Well, just so long as you got a good team
watching out for you. Best of luck![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0026
rows.name:
I've been hearing rumors about some
unbelievably powerful monster out
in the heart of Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0027
rows.name:
But if Lao's going with you, you should
be safe. That guy could take down anything
with a single well-placed shot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0031
rows.name:
They say Iriina's team
got hit by the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0032
rows.name:
We need to go save her. I know
she looks tough, but she's got
a bit of a careless streak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0033
rows.name:
And honestly, I don't know that
Gwin is up for it. We'd better
do the rescue ourselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0070
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0071
rows.name: Add Doug to your team.

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0080
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0081
rows.name: Decline Doug's request for now.

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0034
rows.name:
Great, I'm ready when you are. Get
your things together and let's go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0035
rows.name:
Okay, I'll leave this one to you. Just
make sure to bring her back safely, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0040
rows.name:
Lao's still being worked on in the
maintenance center. Sounds like it'll be
a while before he's back in fighting shape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0041
rows.name:
Whaddya say we go clear out the Quest Board
backlog so he doesn't have a damn thing
to do once he's finally back on duty?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0090
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0091
rows.name: Add Doug to your team.

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0100
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0101
rows.name: Decline Doug's request for now.

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0042
rows.name: All right, now we're talking! Let's go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0043
rows.name:
You sure? Well, maybe I'll go
pay the guy a visit, then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0048
rows.name:
Lao's still being worked on in the
maintenance center. Sounds like it'll be
a while before he's back in fighting shape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0049
rows.name:
If you're going all the way
out to White Woods, could you
maybe let me tag along?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0110
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0111
rows.name: Add Doug to your team.

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0120
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0121
rows.name: Decline Doug's request for now.

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0050
rows.name: All right, now we're talking! Let's go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0051
rows.name:
Well, just so long as you have a good
team watching out for you. Best of luck![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0056
rows.name:
I need to be the one to do it. I need
to stop him with my own two hands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0057
rows.name:
You understand that, right?
Then you gotta take me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0130
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0131
rows.name: Add Doug to your team.

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0140
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0141
rows.name: Decline Doug's request for now.

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0058
rows.name:
If a friend's about to make a terrible
mistake, I will risk my life to stop
them. That's what friends do, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0059
rows.name:
That's your final decision?
...Well, okay then. I guess I'm
counting on you to stop him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0064
rows.name: Thanks for saving Lao.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0065
rows.name:
I feel like I owe you one. Can I help out
with your next mission or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0150
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0151
rows.name: Add Doug to your team.

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0160
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0161
rows.name: Decline Doug's request for now.

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0066
rows.name:
Thanks! I'll help out in any way
that I can. You just say the word.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0067
rows.name:
I understand. But if you ever find yourself
shorthanded, my offer still stands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0072
rows.name:
We made it through all the rehearsals,
and now it's finally showtime![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0073
rows.name:
If I could be of some use to you, just
say the word. I'll give you every last
drop of strength that I've got![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0170
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0171
rows.name: Add Doug to your team.

rows.label: tev000701_JNK0180
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000701_SEL0181
rows.name: Decline Doug's request for now.

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0074
rows.name:
When this battle's finally done,
I'm buying Lin 10 cups of hot
chocolate from that café she likes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0075
rows.name:
Well, just so long as you have a good
team watching out for you. Best of luck![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0080
rows.name:
Hopefully that dumbass will be able
to come back to his old body soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0081
rows.name:
And then I'll be able to help him atone
for all the suffering he's caused.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0082
rows.name:
But until then, I'll have plenty of
free time on my hands. Wanna take
me somewhere? I'll go wherever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0083
rows.name: All right, now we're talking! Let's go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000701_MSG0084
rows.name:
Well, just so long as you have a good
team watching out for you. Best of luck![ST:wait ]
